Brief description of changes.

## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested my changes
- [ ] YARA rules include required metadata (author, description, date, severity)
- [ ] YARA rules tested against clean files (no false positives)
- [ ] Browser extension tested on Chrome and Firefox
- [ ] No proprietary code or trade secrets included
